title: Warming, Smoky Croatian Cheese Grill
description: A cultured, gooey, cozy dish featuring a smoky cheese filling seasoned with herbs and spices, served on a salt block.

ingredients.name: Pa4730e6537
ingredients.notes: A type of semi-hard cheese with a mild, nutty flavor and a smooth texture.

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat (approx. 3757F).
Season the pa4730e6537 cheese with salt, black pepper, thyme, garlic powder, and smoked paprika.
Using a salt block or a heat-resistant plate, create a grill mark pattern with a small amount of extra virgin olive oil.
Sear the pa4730e6537 cheese on the preheated grill for 2-3 minutes per side, or until it develops a golden-brown crust.
Transfer the cheese to the salt block or heat-resistant plate and top with a sprig of fresh rosemary.

Reduce the grill temperature to medium-low (approx. 2757F) and continue cooking the cheese for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 1607F and has a creamy, gooey center.
Remove the cheese from the grill and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
